books.description: When Gianna watched her sister Aria getting married to a man she barely knew, she promised herself she wouldn’t let the same thing happen to her. books.description: Born into one of the leading Mob families in Chicago, Aria Scuderi struggles to find her own path in a world where no choices are given.
